I8000G_ICD_7_CD I8000G_ICD_7_CD I8000G Additional Active Diagnoses: ICD 7 Code CHAR 8 This column contains ICD (International Classification of Diseases) code 7 for an additional active diagnoses in the last seven days.
330 I8000H_ICD_8_CD I8000H_ICD_8_CD I8000H Additional Active Diagnoses: ICD 8 Code CHAR 8 This column contains ICD (International Classification of Diseases) code 8 for an additional active diagnoses in the last seven days.
331 I8000I_ICD_9_CD I8000I_ICD_9_CD I8000I Additional
